CREATE TABLE main_list (id INT, values ARRAY<INT>);
CREATE TABLE sub_list (id INT, values ARRAY<INT>);
SELECT id, array_has_all(values, (SELECT values FROM sub_list WHERE id = 1)) AS all_exist FROM main_list;
SELECT id, array_has_all(values, (SELECT values FROM sub_list WHERE id = 2)) AS all_exist FROM main_list;
SELECT id, array_has_all((SELECT values FROM main_list WHERE id = 1), [1, 2]) AS all_exist;
SELECT m.id, array_has_all(m.values, s.values) AS all_exist FROM main_list m JOIN sub_list s ON m.id = s.id;
SELECT id FROM main_list WHERE array_has_all(values, (SELECT values FROM sub_list WHERE id = 3)) = FALSE;
SELECT array_has_all(values, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]) AS all_exist FROM main_list WHERE id = 1;
SELECT array_has_all(values, [8, 9]) AS all_exist FROM main_list WHERE id = 3;
SELECT m.id, s.id, array_has_all(m.values, s.values) AS all_exist FROM main_list m CROSS JOIN sub_list s;
SELECT array_has_all(values, [1, 2, 99]) AS all_exist FROM main_list;
SELECT array_has_all((SELECT values FROM main_list LIMIT 1), [1, 2]) AS all_exist;
